name: batch-read
description: Read multiple files or line ranges in one native tool call, collapsing 30+ cat calls into 1 step.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Space-separated file paths or file:start-end ranges

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show first N lines of each file

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N lines of each file

parameters.name: --lines
parameters.description: Line range start-end to apply to all files

parameters.name: --dir
parameters.description: Directory path to find files in

cost_saving_rationale: Reads multiple files in one step instead of one-at-a-time cat calls, saving N-1 steps per batch.
